page_title: Evangelion: 1.0 You Are (Not) Alone Original Soundtrack (2014HR Remaster Ver.)
text:
Evangelion: 1.0 You Are (Not) Alone Original Soundtrack [2014HR Remaster Ver.] is the soundtrack remaster album to the film Evangelion: 1.0 You Are (Not) Alone, released on 05 November 2014. It was composed by Shirō Sagisu and published by King Records via its label KING AMUSEMENT CREATIVE with the catalog number NOPA-499. https://vgmdb.net/album/122000
